mappingPolicy.copyPolicy: Do not copy the full source dataset into this repository. Keep only the P0 demo subset.
mappingPolicy.normalizationPolicy: FinMate seed values are normalized for the P0 presentation flow and are not a full ledger replay.
mappingPolicy.privacyPolicy: Only synthetic, masked, and presentation-safe fields are exposed in this public package.
